heading: “United States” defined
label: 38 “United States” defined
text: The term “United States” as used in sections 34 to 39 of this title includes the Canal Zone and all territory continental or insular, subject to the jurisdiction of the United States of America.
notes: References in TextFor definition of Canal Zone, referred to in text, see , Foreign Relations and Intercourse.section 3602(b) of Title 22

CodificationWords “the Philippine Islands” deleted on authority of Proc. No. 2695 issued pursuant to , Foreign Relations and Intercourse, which recognized independence of Philippine Islands as of . Proc. No. 2695 is set out under .section 1394 of Title 22section 1394 of Title 22July 4, 1946Section was not enacted as part of the Submarine Cable Act which comprises this chapter.
